title: Dream Dao World
content:
The 
Dream Dao World
 is a "dream" formed by 
Wang Lin
 using his dao spell, Dream Dao upon himself after consuming three Dao Fruits.

He did this after he barely survived 
Sovereign
's 
Fishing the Moon in the Well
 ambush and was thrown to the outer edges of the 
Cave
 along with 
Lian Daofei
.

He did this to comprehend his three ethereal essences: Life-Death, Karma, and True-False which would allow him to reach the Third Step.

During his "dream," Wang Lin met many people from his 2,000 years of cultivation and relived many memories. The "dream," however, is something of an anomaly: Wang Lin met 
Red Butterfly
's teacher in the "dream" and gave baby Red Butterfly her name and told her teacher of a formation that could allow Red Butterfly to survive her Life-Death Tribulation. Wang Lin had seen this formation IRL on 
Planet Suzaku
 sometime ago after hearing about it from 
Zhou Wutai
. However, the paradoxical element emerged many years later when Red Butterfly informed Wang Lin that her teacher had met a scholar named Wang Lin who informed her about the formation that allowed Red Butterfly to survive her Life-Death Tribulation. This put Wang Lin's mind in disarray as he became genuinely confused as to whether his Dream Dao World was just a "dream" or if he had traveled back in time to a previous life.
